text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has come for the Yasuda Kinen, where
Maruzensky is set to compete against Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Excited about competing against the promising
younger student, Maruzensky goes into the race
with great enthusiasm.
